title: schellolepis benguetensis
intro: Schellolepis benguetensis, also known as Benguet mountain tea, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy among locals. In terms of herbal preparations, Schellolepis benguetensis is often made into tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed hot or cold to harness its medicinal properties.
